session.user:
Run these commands and report results:
1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/remove_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_post_action_comment.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_apply_landed_update.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py 2>&1` 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/remove_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_post_action_comment.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py 2>&1` 3. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_add_objective_node.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_remove_objective_node.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_post_action_comment.py -x -q 2>&1 | tail -10` 4. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m pytest packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/github/metadata/test_roadmap_frontmatter.py -k "remove_node or add_node_auto or add_node_explicit or add_node_no_phase" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -10`
Report pass/fail for each.

## Summary
Here are the test results:
**1. Ruff lint check** - PASSED All files pass ruff lint checks.
**2. Ruff format check** - FAILED One file needs reformatting: - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py` would be reformatted
**3. Pytest exec script unit tests** - PASSED All 30 tests passed: - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_add_objective_node.py` - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_remove_objective_node.py` - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_post_action_comment.py`
**4. Pytest roadmap frontmatter tests** - PASSED All 6 tests passed for the specified test names: - `remove_node` - `add_node_auto` - `add_node_explicit` - `add_node_no_phase`
The only issue is formatting in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_objective_node.py`.
